sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48583" key="qewrh/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεωρ-ήμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n48583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contemplative</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.220</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
